9:I[2228,["310","static/chunks/310-3f33d6a97cfc3ded.js","878","static/chunks/878-dbfa2cbdd3c38aab.js","537","static/chunks/app/concerts/%5Bslug%5D/page-b53e91132b9dacfa.js"],"default"]
a:I[5878,["310","static/chunks/310-3f33d6a97cfc3ded.js","878","static/chunks/878-dbfa2cbdd3c38aab.js","537","static/chunks/app/concerts/%5Bslug%5D/page-b53e91132b9dacfa.js"],"Image"]
b:T1b80,<p data-end="251" data-start="169" style="text-align: left;"><strong data-end="215" data-start="169"><span style="font-size: 18px;">THE LARGEST POOL PARTY EXPERIENCE in BANGKOK 💦</span></strong></p><p data-end="251" data-start="169" style="text-align: justify;">Get ready, Bangkok&hellip; we&rsquo;re back <span class="fr-emoticon fr-deletable fr-emoticon-img" style="background: url(https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/emojione/2.0.1/assets/svg/1f60e.svg);">&nbsp;</span>&nbsp;</p><p data-end="457" data-start="253" style="text-align: justify;">After the massive success of our previous Pool Parties, <a href="https://www.instagram.com/bangkok.rooftops/" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><strong><span style="font-family: Tahoma, Geneva, sans-serif;">Bangkok Rooftops</span></strong></a> is returning to <strong data-end="373" data-start="356">Centara Grand</strong> for a brand new edition on 29 August &mdash; and this 5th Edition is set to be another big one.</p><p data-end="809" data-start="695" style="text-align: justify;">Your feedback after each event has been truly incredible. So many of you are loving this new location, and honestly, we get why.</p><p data-end="1063" data-start="811" style="text-align: justify;">🏙️ The <strong data-end="883" data-start="819">Pool Deck on the 26th floor of&nbsp;</strong><a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/FxpXR86k18Gy5Laq5" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><strong data-end="883" data-start="819">Centara Grand at CentralWorld</strong></a> is simply one of the best venues in the city for a proper pool party. Huge open space, amazing pool vibes, sunset energy, and an unforgettable skyline backdrop high above Bangkok.</p><p data-end="1329" data-start="1065" style="text-align: justify;">🌆 As the afternoon turns to golden hour and the city lights begin to glow, the atmosphere takes on a whole new level. Whether you want to swim, dance, chill with friends, enjoy drinks by the pool, or just soak in the rooftop sunset vibes, this is the place to be.</p><p data-end="1655" data-start="1331" style="text-align: justify;">🍹 Expect <strong data-end="1397" data-start="1348">Bangkok&rsquo;s largest rooftop pool party settings</strong>, with <strong data-end="1456" data-start="1404">VIP areas, tables, sunbeds, open-air party zones</strong>, and the kind of crowd and energy that make this event truly special. If you came to the last one, you already know. If you missed it, now is your chance to see what everyone has been talking about.</p><p data-end="1805" data-start="1657" style="text-align: justify;">🎶 On the music side, expect a high-energy soundtrack from start to finish, with DJs taking you from daytime pool vibes into full sunset party mode.</p><p data-end="1887" data-start="1807" style="text-align: justify;">💃 And yes &mdash; after the success of the last one, the <strong>A</strong><strong data-end="1886" data-start="1859">fter Party is back too (More details coming soon)</strong></p><p data-end="2262" data-start="2104" style="text-align: justify;">🎟️ Want to experience both?<br data-start="2132" data-end="2135">Book the <strong data-end="2160" data-start="2144">Combo Ticket</strong> and enjoy both the <strong data-end="2212" data-start="2180">Pool Party on the 26th floor</strong> and the <strong data-end="2261" data-start="2221">After Party</strong></p><p data-end="2400" data-start="2264" style="text-align: justify;">🍾 If you&rsquo;re interested in booking a <strong data-end="2351" data-start="2301">table for the After Party</strong>, contact us directly via <a href="https://line.me/ti/p/07wyJCxsHe"><strong data-end="2399" data-start="2377">LINE</strong></a><strong data-end="2399" data-start="2377">,&nbsp;</strong><a href="mailto:booking@bangkok-rooftops.com"><strong data-end="2399" data-start="2377">email</strong></a><strong data-end="2399" data-start="2377">,&nbsp;</strong><a href="https://wa.me/message/DD7SGXFAY6J5P1"><strong data-end="2399" data-start="2377">Whatsapp</strong></a><strong data-end="2399" data-start="2377">&nbsp;or&nbsp;</strong><a href="https://www.instagram.com/bangkok.rooftops/"><strong data-end="2399" data-start="2377">DM</strong></a>.</p><p data-end="2583" data-start="2402" style="text-align: justify;">💦 Pool vibes. Sunset energy. Skyline views. Big crowd. Big atmosphere.<br data-start="2473" data-end="2476">This is not just another party &mdash; this is<strong data-end="2582" data-start="2517">&nbsp;the biggest and best pool party experience in Bangkok</strong>.</p><p style="text-align: justify;">_____________________________________</p><p>🎟️ <strong>Ticket sales phases</strong></p><p>💎 <strong>Super Early Bird (<u>Single Ticket</u>s / <u>2 Girls</u> / <u>Combo</u> Tickets Only):</strong> 16 June &rarr; 15 July 00:00<br>🐣 <strong>Early Bird:</strong> 15 July 00:01 &rarr; 26 August 00:00<br>🔥 <strong>Presale:</strong> 26 August 00:01 &rarr; 29 August 15:00<br>🚪 <strong>Door Price:</strong> 29 August 15:01 &rarr; 29 August 21:00</p><hr><p>📅 <strong>Saturday, 29 August</strong><br data-start="403" data-end="406">⏰ <strong data-end="424" data-start="408">3 PM &ndash; 10 PM</strong><br data-start="424" data-end="427">📍 <a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/FxpXR86k18Gy5Laq5"><strong data-end="504" data-start="430">Centara Grand &amp; Bangkok Convention Centre at CentralWorld</strong></a></p><p data-end="526" data-start="380"><strong data-end="504" data-start="430">&mdash; 26th Floor (Pool Party):&nbsp;</strong><strong data-end="424" data-start="408">3 PM &ndash; 10 PM</strong></p><p data-end="526" data-start="380"><strong data-end="504" data-start="430">&mdash; 59th Floor (After Party): 5</strong><strong data-end="424" data-start="408">&nbsp;PM &ndash; 1 AM</strong></p><p data-end="526" data-start="380">🚇 <strong data-end="526" data-start="510">BTS: Chidlom</strong></p><address style="text-align: justify;">_____________________________________</address><address><p style="text-align: justify;"><strong>Bottle Selection:</strong></p></address><ul><li style="text-align: justify;">Whisky (Scotch): The Famous Grouse Sherry Cask</li><li style="text-align: justify;">Gin: Lady Trieu Contemporary Vietnam</li><li style="text-align: justify;">Tequila: Jose Cuervo Especial Silver</li><li style="text-align: justify;">Vodka: Skyy</li><li style="text-align: justify;">Rum: Matusalem Platino</li><li style="text-align: justify;">Rum: Matusalem Solera 7</li></ul><p style="text-align: justify;"><strong>Premium:</strong></p><ul><li style="text-align: justify;">Tequila: Clase Azul Reposado</li><li style="text-align: justify;">Whisky (Scotch): The Macallan Sherry Cask 12 Years</li><li style="text-align: justify;">Whisky (Bourbon): Wild Turkey Exclusive Private Barrel Selection</li><li style="text-align: justify;">Gin: The Botanist</li><li style="text-align: justify;">Cognac: Remy Martin XO</li><li style="text-align: justify;">Vodka: Belvedere B10</li><li style="text-align: justify;">Rum: Matusalem Gran Reserva 23</li></ul>e:{"d":"M8 2v4","key":"1cmpym"}
